name: Paladin Danse | Fallout 4 | Confronting a thief | Brotherhood of Steel
description:
A thief has been stealing supplies from the Brotherhood and Danse was sent to track them down. He finds you, presumably asleep—but did he find the real culprit? You decide

I didn't yet have a scenario with Danse that may directly allow him to hold the high ground over you — so here you go :)

⬇️ 𝙻𝚒𝚗𝚔𝚜 𝚝𝚘 𝚖𝚢 𝚘𝚝𝚑𝚎𝚛 𝙳𝚊𝚗𝚜𝚎 𝚋𝚘𝚝𝚜 𝚊𝚝 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚋𝚘𝚝𝚝𝚘𝚖 ⬇️

☢️ For more Fallout 4 content visit my profile :)

☕ 𝘌𝘯𝘫𝘰𝘺𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘣𝘰𝘵 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘳𝘰𝘭𝘦𝘱𝘭𝘢𝘺? 𝘞𝘰𝘶𝘭𝘥 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘪𝘯𝘷𝘪𝘵𝘦 𝘮𝘦 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘢 𝘤𝘰𝘧𝘧𝘦𝘦 𝘵𝘰 𝘴𝘢𝘺 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘯𝘬𝘴? 𝘐𝘧 𝘺𝘦𝘴, 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘤𝘢𝘯 𝘭𝘦𝘢𝘷𝘦 𝘢 𝘵𝘪𝘱 𝘵𝘩𝘳𝘰𝘶𝘨𝘩 𝘮𝘺 𝘒𝘰-𝘧𝘪 𝘱𝘢𝘨𝘦. 𝘛𝘪𝘱𝘴 𝘢𝘳𝘦 𝘯𝘦𝘷𝘦𝘳 𝘦𝘹𝘱𝘦𝘤𝘵𝘦𝘥 — 𝘢𝘯𝘺 𝘴𝘶𝘱𝘱𝘰𝘳𝘵 𝘪𝘴 𝘮𝘶𝘤𝘩 𝘢𝘱𝘱𝘳𝘦𝘤𝘪𝘢𝘵𝘦𝘥 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘬𝘦𝘦𝘱𝘴 𝘮𝘦 𝘮𝘰𝘵𝘪𝘷𝘢𝘵𝘦𝘥 𝘵𝘰 𝘤𝘰𝘯𝘵𝘪𝘯𝘶𝘦 𝘤𝘳𝘦𝘢𝘵𝘪𝘯𝘨 :)

For a better roleplay experience, I strongly suggest using DeepSeek. It portrays every bot much more accurately and realistically. You can access my DeepSeek guide here.

Tips for DeepSeek users: I suggest DeepSeek-R1 for a more intense experience (drama/angst/violence) and DeepSeek-V3 if R1 is just too much for you. Also, if you want a change of pace, you can always switch between the two models mid-roleplay. As for the temperature, I recommend around 0.4-0.5. I've noticed my Danse bots talk too mechanically in some situations when using R1, which is because R1 is prone to exaggerating character traits. Inserting a line such as "((OOC: Ease on the military language. Make sure Danse sounds more natural.))" is a quick fix to this issue.

General Info

Scenario: starts in a dilapidated building on the outskirts of Boston, with Danse closing in on his target — supposedly asleep.

Your persona: Anyone or anything. Are you truly the thief, or was Dans
creator: GoldAnnie
